strengths: 10+ years across the stack with recent TypeScript/Node.js/React product work at Optilyz and re:cinq, exceeding the 6+ year requirement
Direct AI agent development experience: MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks at current role
Deep testing culture: TDD/CI/CD practice at RIDE, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere on the resume
No Kotlin exposure and Java use appears dated (Altom, 2016-2018); Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named
Frontend depth skews toward Ember.js historically, with React evidenced only at Optilyz
response.justification: Against the role's core competencies the evidence is strong: TypeScript/Node/React with MongoDB and AWS CDK at Optilyz covers the primary stack and cloud/database requirements; MCP code-generator work at re:cinq satisfies the AI-agent requirement, which many candidates lack; Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective and Docker/GitLab CI work at Altom cover containerization; TDD and trunk-based development at RIDE plus authored testing libraries evidence testing expertise; a CS bachelor's meets the education bar; high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby evidence architecture and performance skills. Gaps are secondary-stack items: Nest.js is absent, Kotlin is absent, and Java is stale — learnable given demonstrated polyglot range (D, C++, Swift, PHP, Java). Security/auth practice is not explicitly cited, a minor evidence gap.
